name: runtimewire
description: The latest RuntimeWire AI-news headlines in your VS Code, VSCodium, or Antigravity status bar, for the minutes you spend waiting on a coding agent.

commands.title: RuntimeWire: Open current headline or sponsor

runtimewire.apiBase.markdownDescription: RuntimeWire origin to read news + ads from. Change only for self-hosted/staging. For your security this is a user-level (application-scoped) setting so a workspace cannot redirect your signed-in requests; it must be HTTPS (only `localhost` may use http).

runtimewire.newsCount.description: How many news headlines to show alongside the single sponsored slot (4–6).

runtimewire.refreshSeconds.description: How often the feed refreshes, in seconds.

runtimewire.categories.markdownDescription: Only show headlines in these RuntimeWire topics. Leave empty to show every topic. Options: `ai`, `startups`, `products`, `funding`, `founder-moves`, `exits`, `venture`, `scoops`, `latest`.

runtimewire.prominent.description: Give the RuntimeWire status-bar entry a high-contrast background so it stands out on busy or high-DPI status bars.

runtimewire.adsOnly.description: Hide RuntimeWire news headlines and show only the sponsored slot in the status bar. When no ad is available the entry falls back to the plain RuntimeWire label.
